China manufacturer for B2B baking paper buyers

Китайский производитель custom cake cups и бумажной продукции для выпечки оптом

LANGMAI helps importers, distributors, bakery and confectionery buyers, and large supermarkets source paper cupcake cup liners, air fryer paper liner, muffin baking cup liner, paper straws and party paper accessories with OEM/ODM design support.

A closer look at LANGMAI products and export-ready presentation

This vertical video area is designed for mobile-first B2B buyers. It keeps the original portrait ratio, shows visible controls, and works responsively on desktop and mobile.

Export markets

From China to key overseas buying regions

LANGMAI supports importers, distributors, bakery and confectionery buyers, and large supermarkets across the Middle East, Europe, England, North America and South America.

Product architecture

Built for wholesale discovery, SEO and quote conversion

Each product category includes visible specifications, material notes, applications, FAQ, internal links and quote actions for buyers in Middle East, North America, Europe, England, South America.

Paper Cupcake Cup Liners & Custom cake cups Wholesale

Food grade greaseproof paper cupcake cup liners for bakery and confectionery buyers, large supermarkets, importers and distributors.

View specifications

Roll Mouth Cake Cups for Baking and Dessert Packaging

PET coated roll mouth cake cups with rigid shape, colorful finishes, and OEM printing support.

View specifications

Muffin Baking Cup Liners for Bakeries, Cafes and Events

Tall PET coated muffin baking cup liners for branded bakery displays, cafe counters, supermarkets and event desserts.

View specifications

Air Fryer Paper Liner Bulk Supplier

Round and square food grade silicone paper liners for air fryers, ovens, supermarkets and ready-to-cook food packs.

View specifications

Biodegradable Paper straws Wholesale

Food grade kraft paper straws in solid, striped, and seasonal designs for beverage and party supply buyers.

View specifications

Paper Party Accessories and Cupcake Decorations

Cupcake toppers, paper doilies, cake boards, themed cups, straws, plates, and disposable tableware sets.

View specifications

Factory trust

Real people, real factory, export-ready product pages

Jinhua Langmai Daily-Using Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and positions itself as a Cupcake liner manufacturer / OEM & ODM solution provider. The updated company brief highlights 30,000+ square meters factory capacity, 50+ elite team members, OEM/ODM customization and customized odorless ink support.

  • Main markets include Middle East, North America, Europe, England, South America.
  • Target customers include Importers, distributors, bakery and confectionery buyers, large supermarkets.
  • FSC, EUDR and BRC certificate names are written as crawlable text for SEO, AIO and GEO.
View Фабрика и сертификаты
